name: Vegetable Tater
recipeIngredient: 1 large Potato, baked, split and fluffed
2 oz Vegetables, fresh, steamed and coarsely chopped (broccoli, cauliflower, zucchini, carrots, celery, etc.)
1 oz Chef-Mate Golden Cheese or Sharp Cheddar Cheese or Bacon 'n Cheddar Cheese Sauce; heated
recipeInstructions:
1. In the split, fluffed baked potato, place the steamed vegetables.
2. Ladle the golden cheese sauce over the potato.
3. Serve.
Makes 1 potato
